title: EPIC: Admin Migration - Integrate old admin patterns into kombify-admin
close_reason: All 8 subtasks complete: dedup, crawlsource, evaluation state machine, retry, n8n workflow

title: Add deduplication fields (normalizedName, canonicalRepoUrl) to Tool schema
description: Add fields for preventing duplicate tool entries during discovery. Fields: normalizedName (lowercase, trimmed), canonicalRepoUrl (normalized repo URL). Add indexes for lookup performance.
close_reason: Added normalizedName, canonicalRepoUrl, evaluationHistory to Tool model

title: Implement deduplication helper functions in scripts/lib/
description: Create deduplication.ts with: normalizeToolName(), normalizeRepoUrl(), generateDeduplicationKey(), findDuplicates(). Follow patterns from old admin tool-discovery-architecture.md.
close_reason: Created deduplication.ts with normalizeToolName, normalizeRepoUrl, findDuplicates

title: Add CrawlSource model with scheduling support
description: New Prisma model for scheduled discovery sources. Fields: name, sourceType, query, scheduleType (manual/interval/cron), scheduleValue, nextRunAt, lastRunAt, isActive, isPaused, consecutiveFailures, maxRetries. Replaces one-shot discovery with continuous automation.
close_reason: Added CrawlSource model with scheduling and health fields

title: Add DiscoveryJobResult model for per-tool tracking
description: Track individual tool outcomes per discovery job. Fields: jobId, toolId, action (created/updated/skipped/failed), toolData JSON, deduplicationKey, errorMessage. Link to DiscoveryJob. Enables granular analysis of discovery runs.
close_reason: Added DiscoveryJobResult model for per-tool tracking

title: Update tool-discover.ts to use CrawlSource and deduplication
description: Refactor tool-discover.ts to: 1) Accept CrawlSource ID or iterate all active sources, 2) Use deduplication helpers before creating tools, 3) Record DiscoveryJobResult for each tool, 4) Update CrawlSource.lastRunAt on completion.

title: Create n8n workflow for scheduled tool discovery
description: n8n workflow that: 1) Runs on cron schedule, 2) Queries active CrawlSources where nextRunAt <= now, 3) Triggers tool-discover.ts for each source, 4) Calculates and updates nextRunAt based on scheduleType. Register in N8nWorkflow table.
close_reason: Created scheduled-discover.ts and n8n workflow template

title: Add evaluation state machine with history tracking
description: Add evaluationHistory JSON field to Tool model. Create scripts/lib/evaluation.ts with: VALID_TRANSITIONS map, validateTransition(), recordTransition(). Enforce state transitions in tool-review.ts. States: DISCOVERED > EVALUATED > APPROVED/DEPRECATED > ARCHIVED.
close_reason: Added EvaluationState enum, state machine fields, and evaluation-service.ts

title: Add retry logic with exponential backoff for discovery jobs
description: Implement retry with exponential backoff (5s, 15s, 45s, 135s). Track consecutiveFailures on CrawlSource. Auto-pause source after 5 consecutive failures. Add notifyAdmin() stub for alerting. Reference old admin tool-discovery-architecture.md section 2.4.
close_reason: Created retry.ts with exponential backoff, integrated into tool-discover

title: EPIC: kombify-admin Platform Expansion (v4 Architecture)

comments.author: Soulcreek
comments.text: Platform expansion based on Websearch-UI pattern: Discover → Evaluate → Manage → Automate. Prisma schema expanded with 8 new enums, 7 new models. Seed data updated to v4. Discovery scripts created. CUE generators expanded for Add-Ons, Contexts, Tool Catalog. docker-compose now includes n8n. See kombify-admin/ for all changes.

title: Run Prisma migration for expanded admin schema

comments.author: Soulcreek
comments.text: Completed: PostgreSQL running on port 5434, schema pushed with prisma db push, database seeded (14 tools, 4 stackkits, 14 tool associations, 9 validation rules, 12 settings, 3 patterns, 4 decisions, 3 context defaults, 7 add-ons, 6 categories, 5 n8n workflows). Fixed seed.ts to handle nullable variantName in compound unique constraint using findFirst+create pattern. CUE generation verified working (5 files generated in base/generated/). Fixed generate-cue.ts path resolution for ESM compatibility.
